name: Glia AI Agents
description: AI-native platform for banking and financial services customer interactions. Includes Glia CoPilot (self-learning AI tool) and Glia Banker (autonomous agent for customer/member interactions). Designed to autonomously resolve up to 80% of routine inquiries across channels.
notes: Specialized for banking/financial services. Glia CoPilot is an adaptive learning tool; Glia Banker handles customer interactions with high autonomy.
